guarantee.meaning_of_pass: No counterexample was found for the encoded formula, or the desired condition was satisfiable, depending on query polarity. Evidence must state polarity.
guarantee.meaning_of_fail: A model or unsatisfiable core was returned that refutes the encoded obligation, depending on query polarity.
guarantee.meaning_of_unknown: The solver returned unknown, timed out, or the adapter lacked sufficient context to encode the obligation.

assumptions: The finite abstraction captures the relevant behavior of the changed system.
The query polarity is recorded in the proof obligation.
limits: Does not prove properties outside the encoded abstraction.
May return unknown for unsupported theories or timeout.
